title: Ground spread fertiliser and soil ameliorant
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Ground spread fertiliser and soil ameliorant demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Confirm customer requirements

pcs.text: Confirm with customer that fertiliser or soil ameliorant products to be spread are consistent with customer order
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm with customer that fertiliser or soil ameliorant products to be spread are consistent with customer order?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm with customer that fertiliser or soil ameliorant products to be spread are consistent with customer order.

pcs.text: Verify with customer that technical specification of products are acceptable for job
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Verify with customer that technical specification of products are acceptable for job?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Verify with customer that technical specification of products are acceptable for job.

pcs.text: Confirm fertiliser order documentation with customer to enable depot and factory traceability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm fertiliser order documentation with customer to enable depot and factory traceability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm fertiliser order documentation with customer to enable depot and factory traceability.

pcs.text: Document spreading services agreement according to workplace requirements and industry code of practice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document spreading services agreement according to workplace requirements and industry code of practice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document spreading services agreement according to workplace requirements and industry code of practice.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Confirm customer requirements

elements.title: Identify features of target area

pcs.text: Identify and agree with customer on the location and boundaries of area to be treated and document according to workplace requirements and industry code of practice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and agree with customer on the location and boundaries of area to be treated and document according to workplace requirements and industry code of practice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and agree with customer on the location and boundaries of area to be treated and document according to workplace requirements and industry code of practice.

pcs.text: Visually assess soil type and condition or seek advice from customer
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Visually assess soil type and condition or seek advice from customer?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Visually assess soil type and condition or seek advice from customer.

pcs.text: Identify environmentally sensitive areas and plan operations to ensure minimum adverse impact and compliance with required buffer zones
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify environmentally sensitive areas and plan operations to ensure minimum adverse impact and compliance with required buffer zones?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify environmentally sensitive areas and plan operations to ensure minimum adverse impact and compliance with required buffer zones.

pcs.text: Inspect and identify features that present a hazard to the operation, consult with customer and take appropriate action to minimise risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect and identify features that present a hazard to the operation, consult with customer and take appropriate action to minimise risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect and identify features that present a hazard to the operation, consult with customer and take appropriate action to minimise risks.

pcs.text: Identify the location of services and utilities in consultation with customer and adjust proposed spreading operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the location of services and utilities in consultation with customer and adjust proposed spreading operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the location of services and utilities in consultation with customer and adjust proposed spreading operation.

pcs.text: Identify local weather and climate conditions and take into account potential impacts when preparing for operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify local weather and climate conditions and take into account potential impacts when preparing for operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify local weather and climate conditions and take into account potential impacts when preparing for operation.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Identify features of target area

elements.title: Perform pre-spreading checks

pcs.text: Determine rate of spreading and calculate buffer zone allowance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine rate of spreading and calculate buffer zone allowance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine rate of spreading and calculate buffer zone allowance.

pcs.text: Ensure machinery and equipment are clean of soil and/or plant material before it is moved onto site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure machinery and equipment are clean of soil and/or plant material before it is moved onto site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure machinery and equipment are clean of soil and/or plant material before it is moved onto site.

pcs.text: Prepare, set up, calibrate and confirm serviceability of machinery and equipment according to workplace procedures and manufacturer instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare, set up, calibrate and confirm serviceability of machinery and equipment according to workplace procedures and manufacturer instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare, set up, calibrate and confirm serviceability of machinery and equipment according to workplace procedures and manufacturer instructions.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Perform pre-spreading checks

elements.title: Spread products

pcs.text: Select and maintain personal protective equipment to be used by operator and all personnel involved in spreading tasks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and maintain personal protective equipment to be used by operator and all personnel involved in spreading tasks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and maintain personal protective equipment to be used by operator and all personnel involved in spreading tasks.

pcs.text: Fit and use personal protective equipment according to job requirements and task to be completed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Fit and use personal protective equipment according to job requirements and task to be completed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Fit and use personal protective equipment according to job requirements and task to be completed.

pcs.text: Apply fertiliser or soil ameliorant in a manner that complies with guidelines on buffer zones and minimises run off into waterways and drains
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply fertiliser or soil ameliorant in a manner that complies with guidelines on buffer zones and minimises run off into waterways and drains?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply fertiliser or soil ameliorant in a manner that complies with guidelines on buffer zones and minimises run off into waterways and drains.

pcs.text: Monitor meteorological conditions before and during application and modify operations as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor meteorological conditions before and during application and modify operations as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor meteorological conditions before and during application and modify operations as required.

pcs.text: Identify environmental and biosecurity implications associated with fertiliser or ameliorant application and minimise impact
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify environmental and biosecurity implications associated with fertiliser or ameliorant application and minimise impact?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify environmental and biosecurity implications associated with fertiliser or ameliorant application and minimise impact.

pcs.text: Follow any existing site quarantine or biosecurity protocols
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow any existing site quarantine or biosecurity protocols?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow any existing site quarantine or biosecurity protocols.

pcs.text: Continually monitor workplace hazards and risks, and ensure safety of self, other personnel and equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Continually monitor workplace hazards and risks, and ensure safety of self, other personnel and equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Continually monitor workplace hazards and risks, and ensure safety of self, other personnel and equipment.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Spread products

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct shut down procedures required for ground spread of fertiliser and ameliorant equipment.

pcs.text: Return machinery, equipment and hand tools to depot or storage area according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Return machinery, equipment and hand tools to depot or storage area according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Return machinery, equipment and hand tools to depot or storage area according to workplace procedures.
